title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, run, and manage large language models locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from any Python script or notebook.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node.js and browsers to interact with the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with chat history, model switching, and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs for chat, embed, and model management.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template that combines Ollama embeddings, Chroma vector store, and Llama 2 for local question-answering.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive CLI chat wrapper written in Go that adds conversation memory and syntax highlighting to the Ollama CLI.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot proxy that routes code-completion requests to a local Ollama model instead of OpenAI.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama team providing Generator and Embedding components for building local RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node that lets you call Ollama models inside no-code workflows for summarization, translation, etc.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to Ollama and adds file upload, parameter sliders, and conversation export.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters with GPU support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (Alpine & Ubuntu) published by Ollama team for CPU and CUDA environments.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing async/await bindings to the Ollama REST API with Serde model definitions.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community .NET SDK for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with HttpClient factory patterns and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Ask Ollama” command to summarize notes, brainstorm ideas, or rewrite text using local models.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Python-based Discord bot that replies to mentions with responses generated by any Ollama model.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir library wrapping Ollama’s REST API with Finch HTTP client and Jason JSON decoder for chat and embeddings.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated list of custom Modelfiles and quantization recipes for running niche LLMs with Ollama.
